# Curator Receipt

## Decision

The source is kept because it compiles concrete benchmark and telemetry results into a disciplined comparative artifact.

## Why

The excerpt contains explicit benchmark figures, telemetry, latency numbers, and production-style usage metrics tied to named products, while also stating when official data is absent. It is not just commentary: it organizes source-attributed empirical results across tools and frames benchmark-type distinctions clearly enough to qualify as institute-worthy comparative evidence.

## Limits

# Curator Receipt

## Decision

The source is kept because it compiles concrete benchmark and telemetry results into a disciplined comparative artifact.

The excerpt contains explicit benchmark figures, telemetry, latency numbers, and production-style usage metrics tied to named products, while also stating when official data is absent. ## Limits
